one_liner: OPEN -0.81% on 1.78x elevated volume — first red day after 3 consecutive high-volume up sessions; housing rebound thesis intact but volume on decline warrants caution.

price_action.intraday_story: OPEN's first down day after 3 consecutive high-volume advances. Opened $4.99, touched $5.17 early, then sold back to $4.75 low before closing at $4.90. The 1.78x elevated volume on a down day is the key concern — if buyers don't step in tomorrow, this could mark the distribution top of the housing rebound move.

valuation.summary: DCF distorted for pre-profitability company. Valued on housing volume trajectory. Q1 homes purchased +45% QoQ is the key fundamental metric.

risks: 1.78x volume on a down day after 3 up days — early distribution signal
$5.13 prior intraday high rejected — overhead supply
Operating margins deeply negative (-30%+) — business model requires housing market liquidity
